'''pazata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whahoo|whahoo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-z-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whahoo|whahoo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pazata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæzætæth|pæzætæth]] || [[word:pæzætæj|pæzætæj]] || [[word:pæzætæsh|pæzætæsh]] || [[word:pæzætæ|pæzætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazazatath|pazazatath]] || [[word:pazazataj|pazazataj]] || [[word:pazazatash|pazazatash]] || [[word:pazazata|pazazata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazatath|pazatath]] || [[word:pazataj|pazataj]] || [[word:pazatash|pazatash]] || [[word:pazata|pazata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazaftath|pazaftath]] || [[word:pazaftaj|pazaftaj]] || [[word:pazaftash|pazaftash]] || [[word:pazaftaf|pazaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pazatatha|pazatatha]] || [[word:pazataja|pazataja]] || [[word:pazatasha|pazatasha]] || [[word:pazataka|pazataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pazatath|pazatath]] || [[word:pazataj|pazataj]] || [[word:pazatash|pazatash]] || [[word:pazata|pazata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pazatathal|pazatathal]] || [[word:pazatajal|pazatajal]] || [[word:pazatashal|pazatashal]] || [[word:pazatakal|pazatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pazatathatha|pazatathatha]] || [[word:pazatajaja|pazatajaja]] || [[word:pazatashasha|pazatashasha]] || [[word:pazataka|pazataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pazatathan|pazatathan]] || [[word:pazatajan|pazatajan]] || [[word:pazatashan|pazatashan]] || [[word:pazatakan|pazatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pazatathaoro|pazatathaoro]] || [[word:pazatajaoro|pazatajaoro]] || [[word:pazatashaoro|pazatashaoro]] || [[word:pazatakaoro|pazatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
